config_template.output: optional preallocated output tensor with shape {BCAST_SHAPE}, TILE_LAYOUT, same memory_config as input

constraints.sharding: sharded memory_config not supported (raises RuntimeError); input and output must be interleaved
constraints.rank: input shape must be broadcastable to target shape per standard broadcasting rules; broadcasting along both H and W simultaneously supported (e.g. (1,1,1,1)->(1,13,270,270))

placement_observations.size_descriptor: small-to-medium tiled tensors, e.g. (1,1,1,1) up to (1,13,270,270)
placement_observations.source: unit test: ttnn.from_torch(..., layout=ttnn.TILE_LAYOUT, memory_config=memory_config_input); sharded memory_config raises RuntimeError

unit test: output memory_config matches input memory_config (memory_config=memory_config_input); optional preallocated output tensor uses same interleaved config; sharded output config raises RuntimeError
